outlook_5d: Short-term outlook remains cautious unless momentum improves.
outlook_20d: Medium-term outlook remains weak unless trend structure recovers.
explanation_bullets: This is a scenario-based forecast, not a guaranteed prediction.
Price is below SMA50 and SMA200, which points to a weaker trend regime.
SMA20 is not above SMA50, so short-term trend support is limited.
MACD is below its signal line, which keeps momentum softer.
Rolling volatility is moderate, which improves scenario confidence.
Support is estimated near 578.46 and resistance near 609.44.
Expected range is centered around recent ATR/range behaviour, roughly 585.00 to 605.08.
